description: Batch manifest for porting Spatial Agent reference tasks into portable experiment-only skills.

bioinformatics_utilities.label: Biopython tutorial
bioinformatics_utilities.note: Portable sequence parsing, feature extraction, and record-normalization surface for general coding agents.

bioinformatics_utilities.label: HGNC REST API
bioinformatics_utilities.note: Gene symbol normalization surface for human gene-centric lookup and panel curation.

communication.label: LIANA documentation
communication.note: Primary aggregation framework for ligand-receptor resources and methods.

communication.label: OmniPath knowledge base
communication.note: Public interaction knowledge base used by communication tools.

communication.label: Squidpy documentation
communication.note: Spatial neighborhood context for communication validation.

communication.label: LIANA+ paper
communication.note: Primary paper describing the LIANA+ unified framework for cell-cell communication inference.

communication.label: OmniPath paper
communication.note: Primary paper for the integrated intra- and intercellular signaling knowledge base used by LIANA and Squidpy communication workflows.

database_lookup.label: NCBI E-utilities documentation
database_lookup.note: Canonical programmatic search and fetch surface for NCBI databases.

database_lookup.label: Ensembl REST API
database_lookup.note: Stable gene, transcript, variant, and homology lookup surface.

database_lookup.label: MyGene.info API documentation
database_lookup.note: Convenient gene-centric normalization and annotation API.

database_lookup.label: UniProt API documentation
database_lookup.note: Canonical protein and feature lookup API.

database_lookup.label: ClinVar documentation
database_lookup.note: Reference surface for clinical variant interpretation lookups.

multimodal_modeling.label: scvi-tools documentation
multimodal_modeling.note: Reference for totalVI, MultiVI, and other probabilistic multimodal models.

multimodal_modeling.label: Muon documentation
multimodal_modeling.note: Wrappers and data structures for multimodal AnnData workflows.

multimodal_modeling.label: MOFA2 documentation
multimodal_modeling.note: Factor analysis baseline for multimodal integration and latent signatures.

multimodal_modeling.label: CELLxGENE Census documentation
multimodal_modeling.note: Reference atlas source for label transfer and signature validation.

multimodal_modeling.label: scArches documentation
multimodal_modeling.note: Transfer-learning and reference-mapping extension to scvi-tools for multimodal modeling workflows.

multimodal_modeling.label: MultiVI paper
multimodal_modeling.note: Primary paper for multimodal single-cell integration and uncertainty-aware latent modeling in scvi-tools.

multimodal_modeling.label: scArches paper
multimodal_modeling.note: Primary paper for transfer-learning based mapping to single-cell reference atlases.

multimodal_modeling.label: Single-cell multi-omics benchmark
multimodal_modeling.note: Benchmark comparing multimodal integration and prediction methods, useful for method selection and validation planning.

panel_design.label: CELLxGENE Census documentation
panel_design.note: Reference atlas surface for marker prevalence and cell-type coverage.

panel_design.label: PanglaoDB
panel_design.note: Marker database for cross-study cell-type marker aggregation.

panel_design.label: CellTypist documentation
panel_design.note: Reference markers and label-transfer surfaces that help shortlist robust genes.

panel_design.label: Primer3 manual
panel_design.note: Sequence design constraints for probe or primer-adjacent panel selection.

panel_design.label: MyGene.info API documentation
panel_design.note: Gene alias normalization and metadata enrichment.

sequence_design.label: BLAST command-line user manual
sequence_design.note: Canonical CLI reference for alignment-based sequence identification.

sequence_design.label: Primer3 manual
sequence_design.note: Reference for PCR primer and probe design parameters.

sequence_design.label: Ensembl REST API
sequence_design.note: Sequence and feature retrieval surface for genes and transcripts.

sequence_design.label: ClinVar documentation
sequence_design.note: Variant significance and evidence lookup surface.

sequence_design.label: UniProt API documentation
sequence_design.note: Protein sequence and feature annotations for amino-acid workflows.

spatial_deconvolution.label: scvi-tools documentation
spatial_deconvolution.note: Main documentation for DestVI, gimVI, and related latent-variable models.

spatial_deconvolution.label: cell2location documentation
spatial_deconvolution.note: Reference docs for probabilistic cell-type abundance estimation.

spatial_deconvolution.label: Tangram documentation
spatial_deconvolution.note: Useful as a mapping-first baseline or comparison path.

spatial_deconvolution.label: Muon documentation
spatial_deconvolution.note: Multimodal AnnData utilities and wrappers used in integrated spatial workflows.

spatial_deconvolution.label: cell2location paper
spatial_deconvolution.note: Primary paper for probabilistic cell-type abundance estimation in spatial transcriptomics.

spatial_deconvolution.label: DestVI paper
spatial_deconvolution.note: Primary paper for modeling continuous cell states in spatial transcriptomics with scvi-tools.

spatial_deconvolution.label: Spatial integration benchmark
spatial_deconvolution.note: Benchmark paper comparing mapping, transcript distribution prediction, and deconvolution methods.

spatial_foundation.label: Tangram documentation
spatial_foundation.note: Canonical mapping and projection documentation for single-cell to spatial alignment.

spatial_foundation.label: Tangram GitHub repository
spatial_foundation.note: Reference implementation, tutorials, and issues for Tangram workflows.

spatial_foundation.label: Squidpy documentation
spatial_foundation.note: Spatial graph and neighborhood statistics used for post-mapping validation.

spatial_foundation.label: CELLxGENE Census documentation
spatial_foundation.note: Programmatic access to reference atlases and marker expression summaries.

spatial_foundation.label: CellTypist documentation
spatial_foundation.note: Portable cell-type annotation surface for general coding agents.

spatial_foundation.label: Azimuth documentation
spatial_foundation.note: Reference mapping workflow for label transfer in single-cell settings.

spatial_foundation.label: SpatialData documentation
spatial_foundation.note: scverse data model and IO layer for portable spatial single-cell analysis workflows.

spatial_foundation.label: Tangram paper
spatial_foundation.note: Primary paper for single-cell to spatial alignment, projection, and deconvolution with Tangram.

spatial_foundation.label: CellTypist documentation
spatial_foundation.note: Official usage guide for portable query-to-reference cell-type annotation runs.

spatial_structure.label: Squidpy documentation
spatial_structure.note: Reference surface for spatial neighbors, co-occurrence, and Moran's I.

spatial_structure.label: SpaGCN GitHub repository
spatial_structure.note: Graph-based spatial domain detection method and implementation.

spatial_structure.label: GraphST GitHub repository
spatial_structure.note: Alternative graph-based spatial transcriptomics domain model.

spatial_structure.label: Scanpy documentation
spatial_structure.note: Shared AnnData preprocessing and clustering workflow surface.

spatial_structure.label: stLearn documentation
spatial_structure.note: Additional spatial statistics and neighborhood-analysis surface for domain and microenvironment workflows.

spatial_structure.label: Squidpy paper
spatial_structure.note: Primary paper for scalable spatial graph, neighborhood, and co-occurrence analysis.

spatial_structure.label: SpaGCN paper
spatial_structure.note: Primary graph-convolution method paper for spatial domain detection and domain-guided markers.

spatial_structure.label: GraphST paper
spatial_structure.note: Primary paper for spatially informed clustering, integration, and scRNA-to-spatial transfer with GraphST.

spatial_structure.label: CellCharter documentation
spatial_structure.note: Reference documentation for spatial clustering and cellular niche identification from single-cell-resolution spatial data.

spatial_structure.label: Single-cell best practices neighborhood analysis
spatial_structure.note: Public best-practices tutorial covering spatial graphs, neighborhood enrichment, and niche-oriented downstream interpretation.

spatial_structure.label: CellCharter paper
spatial_structure.note: Primary paper for spatial clustering and characterization of tissue niches across spatial -omics data.

tangram_extensions.label: Tangram documentation
tangram_extensions.note: Core documentation for mapping, projection, and expression transfer.

tangram_extensions.label: Tangram GitHub repository
tangram_extensions.note: Implementation details and examples for Tangram-based workflows.

tangram_extensions.label: Squidpy documentation
tangram_extensions.note: Supports spatial validation, neighborhood analysis, and imputation QC.

tangram_extensions.label: Scanpy documentation
tangram_extensions.note: General AnnData preprocessing and QC documentation.

tangram_extensions.label: Tangram paper
tangram_extensions.note: Primary paper for Tangram-based mapping, projection, and dropout-aware expression transfer.

tangram_extensions.label: Spatial integration benchmark
tangram_extensions.note: Benchmark paper for selecting and sanity-checking Tangram-style extensions against alternative methods.

trajectory_modeling.label: scVelo documentation
trajectory_modeling.note: Reference for RNA velocity, dynamics, and velocity graph computation.

trajectory_modeling.label: CellRank documentation
trajectory_modeling.note: Reference for terminal states, absorption probabilities, and lineage fate.

trajectory_modeling.label: Scanpy documentation
trajectory_modeling.note: Shared single-cell preprocessing and neighborhood graph steps.

trajectory_modeling.label: scvi-tools documentation
trajectory_modeling.note: Latent-space alternatives that may feed downstream trajectory inference.

trajectory_modeling.label: scVelo paper
trajectory_modeling.note: Primary paper for dynamical RNA velocity modeling and transient-state trajectory inference.

trajectory_modeling.label: CellRank paper
trajectory_modeling.note: Primary paper for directed cell-fate mapping and terminal-state probability estimation.

tasks.goal: Annotate cell types for single-cell-resolution spatial data using public reference search, supported environment setup, and hierarchical reference transfer without relying on private Spatial Agent tools.
tasks.title: Spatial Cell Type Annotation via Reference Transfer

tasks.goal: Annotate tissue niches for single-cell-resolution spatial data using neighborhood composition and spatial graph evidence rather than private Spatial Agent tools.
tasks.title: Tissue Niche Annotation

tasks.goal: Run an end-to-end communication workflow that combines ligand-receptor scoring, group summaries, and optional spatial validation.
tasks.title: Cell-Cell Communication Analysis

tasks.goal: Deconvolve spot-based spatial measurements to likely single-cell assignments using mapping constraints and explicit QC.
tasks.title: Tangram-Based Cell Deconvolution

tasks.goal: Run CellPhoneDB in a portable way and summarize statistically supported interaction programs.
tasks.title: CellPhoneDB Ligand-Receptor Analysis

tasks.goal: Answer gene, protein, variant, and disease lookup tasks against public APIs and local lookup tables with normalized identifiers.
tasks.title: Bioinformatics Database Query

tasks.goal: Impute unmeasured or sparse genes in spatial data from a paired scRNA-seq reference using portable workflows and explicit validation.
tasks.title: Spatial Gene Imputation

tasks.goal: Run LIANA or LIANA+ with explicit method selection, harmonized metadata, and interpretable interaction prioritization.
tasks.title: LIANA Communication Analysis

tasks.goal: Discover biologically plausible ligand-receptor pairs and prioritize them with expression, interaction, and spatial evidence.
tasks.title: Ligand-Receptor Discovery

tasks.goal: Validate spatial mapping outputs with quantitative metrics, biological sanity checks, and hold-out experiments.
tasks.title: Spatial Mapping Validation

tasks.goal: Integrate RNA, protein, and chromatin modalities with explicit model choice, latent-space QC, and label-transfer outputs.
tasks.title: Multimodal Integration

tasks.goal: Design a balanced marker panel for spatial transcriptomics or targeted assays using explicit evidence and redundancy control.
tasks.title: Spatial Panel Design

tasks.goal: Handle sequence identification, feature lookup, variant inspection, and primer-oriented follow-up tasks in one portable workflow.
tasks.title: Sequence Analysis and Primer Design

tasks.goal: Estimate cell-type abundances in spot-based spatial data with a transparent choice between generative and mapping-based models.
tasks.title: Spatial Deconvolution

tasks.goal: Detect spatial regions or domains with graph-based models and explain the evidence behind the chosen partition.
tasks.title: Spatial Domain Detection

tasks.goal: Map scRNA-seq reference cells or labels onto spatial observations with explicit preprocessing, gene intersection, and QC steps.
tasks.title: Spatial Mapping

tasks.goal: Run portable Squidpy-style spatial graphs, neighborhood enrichment, and image-aware spatial statistics.
tasks.title: Squidpy Spatial Statistics

tasks.goal: Infer trajectories, pseudotime, RNA velocity, and fate probabilities with explicit preprocessing and interpretation checkpoints.
tasks.title: Trajectory and Velocity Inference
